response.justification: Strong full-stack background with 10+ years of professional experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Direct hits on core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) plus current AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Polyglot history (Java, D, C/C++, Python-adjacent work) and DevOps/Kubernetes/Docker exposure round out the profile. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically are minor given demonstrated ability to pick up tools.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP framework experience matching a key requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB stack with 10+ years total experience
Strong engineering craft signals: TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, workshops, OSS
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotics/CVI era)
Heavy DLang focus in mid-career may indicate less recent depth in mainstream JVM ecosystems
